evals.prompt: English text Nature English text PDF English text: English text. English text Original English text, English text, English text, English text.
evals.expected_output: A full-paper Markdown reader with paragraph-level Original/English text pairs, stable source anchors, cropped figure/table assets, figure cards near first substantive mentions, bilingual captions, and grounded follow-up pointers.

evals.prompt: English text DOI. English text-English text Markdown; English text, English text, English text. English text Original/English text English text, English text.
evals.expected_output: A full-document or draft-mode Markdown reader that clearly separates confirmed content from missing content, keeps block/page navigation, and preserves Original/English text alignment for every available block.

evals.prompt: English text. English text OCR, English text Markdown, English text; English text. English text assets English text.
evals.expected_output: An OCR-aware full-document Markdown reader with Original/English text pairs, uncertainty labels, cropped figure/table assets, nearby bilingual captions, page navigation, and source-linked follow-up support.
